'''鈭歜-h-sh''' ('''kabahash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:liaison|liaison]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:liaison|liaison]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-h-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kabahash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibahash|thibahash]] || [[word:jibahash|jibahash]] || [[word:shibahash|shibahash]] || [[word:kibahash|kibahash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubahash|thuthubahash]] || [[word:jujubahash|jujubahash]] || [[word:shushubahash|shushubahash]] || [[word:kukubahash|kukubahash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubahash|thubahash]] || [[word:jubahash|jubahash]] || [[word:shubahash|shubahash]] || [[word:kubahash|kubahash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubahash|thubahash]] || [[word:jubahash|jubahash]] || [[word:shubahash|shubahash]] || [[word:kubahash|kubahash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebahash|thebahash]] || [[word:jebahash|jebahash]] || [[word:shebahash|shebahash]] || [[word:kebahash|kebahash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobahash|thothobahash]] || [[word:jojobahash|jojobahash]] || [[word:shoshobahash|shoshobahash]] || [[word:kokobahash|kokobahash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobahash|thobahash]] || [[word:jobahash|jobahash]] || [[word:shobahash|shobahash]] || [[word:kobahash|kobahash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobahash|thobahash]] || [[word:jobahash|jobahash]] || [[word:shobahash|shobahash]] || [[word:kobahash|kobahash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bahash|bahash]] || [[word:bahash|bahash]] || [[word:bahash|bahash]] || [[word:bahash|bahash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bahash|bahash]] || [[word:bahash|bahash]] || [[word:bahash|bahash]] || [[word:bahash|bahash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bahash|bahash]] || [[word:bahash|bahash]] || [[word:bahash|bahash]] || [[word:bahash|bahash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bahash|bahash]] || [[word:bahash|bahash]] || [[word:bahash|bahash]] || [[word:bahash|bahash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bahash|th忙bahash]] || [[word:j忙bahash|j忙bahash]] || [[word:sh忙bahash|sh忙bahash]] || [[word:k忙bahash|k忙bahash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabahash|thathabahash]] || [[word:jajabahash|jajabahash]] || [[word:shashabahash|shashabahash]] || [[word:kakabahash|kakabahash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabahash|thabahash]] || [[word:jabahash|jabahash]] || [[word:shabahash|shabahash]] || [[word:kabahash|kabahash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabahash|thabahash]] || [[word:jabahash|jabahash]] || [[word:shabahash|shabahash]] || [[word:kabahash|kabahash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabahash|shabahash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabahash|goshabahash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabahash|gokishabahash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabahashn眉|shabahashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabahashnkn眉|goshabahashnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabahashn眉|gokishabahashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabahashsh毛|shabahashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabahashnksh毛|goshabahashnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabahashsh毛|gokishabahashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabahashro|shabahashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabahashnkro|goshabahashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabahashro|gokishabahashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabahashmu|shabahashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabahashnkmu|goshabahashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabahashmu|gokishabahashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabahashsher|shabahashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabahashnksher|goshabahashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabahashsher|gokishabahashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabahashng|shabahashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabahashnkng|goshabahashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabahashng|gokishabahashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabahashya|shabahashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabahashnkya|goshabahashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabahashya|gokishabahashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabahashyam|shabahashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabahashnkyam|goshabahashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabahashyam|gokishabahashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabahashn眉sh毛|shabahashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabahashnkn眉sh毛|goshabahashnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabahashn眉sh毛|gokishabahashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabahashn眉ro|shabahashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabahashnkn眉ro|goshabahashnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabahashn眉ro|gokishabahashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabahashn眉mu|shabahashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabahashnkn眉mu|goshabahashnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabahashn眉mu|gokishabahashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabahashsh毛n眉|shabahashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabahashnksh毛n眉|goshabahashnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabahashsh毛n眉|gokishabahashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabahashsh毛ro|shabahashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabahashnksh毛ro|goshabahashnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabahashsh毛ro|gokishabahashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabahashsh毛mu|shabahashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabahashnksh毛mu|goshabahashnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabahashsh毛mu|gokishabahashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabahashron眉|shabahashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabahashnkron眉|goshabahashnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabahashron眉|gokishabahashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabahashrosh毛|shabahashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabahashnkrosh毛|goshabahashnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabahashrosh毛|gokishabahashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabahashromu|shabahashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabahashnkromu|goshabahashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabahashromu|gokishabahashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabahashmun眉|shabahashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabahashnkmun眉|goshabahashnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabahashmun眉|gokishabahashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabahashmush毛|shabahashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabahashnkmush毛|goshabahashnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabahashmush毛|gokishabahashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabahashmuro|shabahashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabahashnkmuro|goshabahashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabahashmuro|gokishabahashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
